title: YijiaLink 500pcs Universal RC Car Screw Kit Screws Assortment Set Hardware Fasteners Compatible with Axial Redcat HPI Arrma Losi 1/8 1/10 1/12 1/16 Scale RC Cars Trucks Crawler
features: A must-have for your RC Vehicles Trucks Buggy, Short Course,Crawlers, On-Road,Off Road,etc.
Packed in a transparent box, keep your screws organised. Easy to take and use.
Spare Parts for Most 1:8 1/10 1/12 1/16 Scale RC Models.
Compatible with Axial Redcat HPI Arrma Losi 1/8 1/10 1/12 1/16 Scale RC Cars Trucks Crawler.
Package Includes: 500pcs in total, M3 & M4 Screws (Flat head & Round head, Hex Drive),M3 Flat washers, 3mm & 4mm Lock Nuts Body Clips, E-clips,Pins, O-circle
